children.heading: Submission
children.label: a Submission
children.text: Any State containing an area designated or redesignated under as nonattainment with respect to the national primary ambient air quality standards for sulfur oxides, nitrogen dioxide, or lead subsequent to , shall submit to the Administrator, within 18 months of the designation, an applicable implementation plan meeting the requirements of this part.section 7407(d) of this titleNovember 15, 1990

children.heading: States lacking fully approved State implementation plans
children.label: b States lacking fully approved State implementation plans
children.text: Any State containing an area designated nonattainment with respect to national primary ambient air quality standards for sulfur oxides or nitrogen dioxide under , but lacking a fully approved implementation plan complying with the requirements of this chapter (including this part) as in effect immediately before , shall submit to the Administrator, within 18 months of , an implementation plan meeting the requirements of subpart 1 (except as otherwise prescribed by ).section 7407(d)(1)(C)(i) of this titlesection 7514a of this titleNovember 15, 1990November 15, 1990
